'''''Obsession'' 2''' is the second issue of the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] miniseries ''[[Star Wars: Obsession]]''. It was written by [[W. Haden Blackman]], illustrated by [[Brian Ching]], and first published on [[December 29]], [[2004]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]].

The issue is part of the [[Clone Wars multimedia project|''Clone Wars'' multimedia project]], and its story is set around [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], approximately five [[Standard month/Legends|months]] before the events of [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']].

==Publisher's summary==
''Consumed by the belief that the dark Jedi Asajj Ventress still lives, Obi-Wan Kenobi has temporarily forsaken the Clone Wars and recruited Anakin Skywalker in his desperate hunt for Ventress.''

''But Anakin still believes that Obi-Wan is chasing a ghost—and he should know, because he himself ''killed'' Ventress. And Anakin's doubts are not assuaged when, following the trail of the rumors of Ventress' existence, they walk into a trap set by their old enemy, the bounty hunter Durge!''

==Plot summary==
{{Plot|comic}}

==Continuity==
''Obsession 2'' is placed in the [[Rise of the Empire era]], and it is labeled as a part of the [[Clone Wars multimedia project|''Clone Wars'' multimedia project]]. The issue's front matter dates the events of its story to "approximately five [[Standard month/Legends|months]] before the events in [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Revenge of the Sith'']]," around [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]].<ref name="Date note">The events of ''Obsession 2'' are set "approximately five [[Standard month/Legends|months]] before the events in [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Revenge of the Sith'']]." Therefore, based on information from ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'', it can be deduced that the events of ''Obsession 2'' approximately take place in [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]].</ref>
